use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action triggers with red warning styling
Outline-style buttons for secondary navigation actions
Ghost buttons for subtle, background-hover interactions
Link-style buttons for inline navigation within text content
ai_summary: A foundational atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Features multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) following shadcn/ui design patterns. Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings, disabled states, and asChild prop for composition with Radix primitives. Clean, flat visual style with minimal styling that adapts to any design system.
